name: 14" Baby Doll Unicorn Outfit - Gigglescape™: Fantasy-Themed Polyester Clothing Set for 14-Inch Dolls
description:
Enhance their imaginative playtime with this 4-Piece Unicorn Outfit from Gigglescape™. This doll costume includes a unicorn bodysuit with a front opening and a hood featuring a cute unicorn face. Boasting a soft plush construction, this doll costume also comes with gold-tone wings, a hair brush and a colorful hair extension. Designed to fit 14-inch dolls, it's a fun way for your kid to give their companion a magical new look.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
